revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki

revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Ramadan 23''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Ramadan]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Ramadan]] [[ar:23 رمضان]] [[bn:২৩ রমজান]] [[fa:۲۳ رمضان]] [[sd:23 رمضان]] [[ur:23 رمضان]] [[uz:Ramazon oyining 23-kuni]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Ramadan 23''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Ramadan]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Ramadan]] [[ar:23 رمضان]] [[bn:২৩ রমজান]] [[fa:۲۳ رمضان]] [[sd:23 رمضان]] [[ur:23 رمضان]] [[uz:Ramazon oyining 23-kuni]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Islamic Ramadan}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Ramadan 23''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Ramadan]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Ramadan]] [[ar:23 رمضان]] [[bn:২৩ রমজান]] [[fa:۲۳ رمضان]] [[sd:23 رمضان]] [[ur:23 رمضان]] [[uz:Ramazon oyining 23-kuni]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Ramadan 23''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Ramadan]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Ramadan]] [[ar:23 رمضان]] [[bn:২৩ রমজান]] [[fa:۲۳ رمضان]] [[sd:23 رمضان]] [[ur:23 رمضان]] [[uz:Ramazon oyining 23-kuni]]

{{Islamic Ramadan}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Ramadan 23''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Ramadan]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Ramadan]] [[ar:23 رمضان]] [[bn:২৩ রমজান]] [[fa:۲۳ رمضان]] [[sd:23 رمضان]] [[ur:23 رمضان]] [[uz:Ramazon oyining 23-kuni]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Bot: add wikidata link from Arabic interwiki (Q4121224)
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 8]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:23 رمضان]][[bn:২৩ রমজান]][[en:23 Ramadan]][[fa:۲۳ رمضان]][[ms:23 Ramadan]][[sd:23 رمضان]][[ur:23 رمضان]][[uz:Ramazon oyining 23-kuni]]

{{Islamic Ramadan}}

'''Ramadan 23''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Ramadan]].

'''Ramadan 23''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Ramadan]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]]
[[ar:23 رمضان]] [[bn:২৩ রমজান]] [[fa:۲۳ رمضان]] [[sd:23 رمضان]] [[ur:23 رمضان]] [[uz:Ramazon oyining 23-kuni]] {{Islamic Calendar}}
